root_cause: Upstream schema change in document ingestion pipeline
preventive_action: Added schema validation layer in ingestion pipeline

root_cause: Downstream dbt job bottleneck due to large dataset
preventive_action: Optimized incremental dbt models

root_cause: Role mapping mismatch between RBAC engine and user directory
preventive_action: Standardized role mapping definitions

root_cause: Token service dependency failure
preventive_action: Added redundancy to token service cluster

root_cause: Over-sensitive latency thresholds
preventive_action: Adjusted alert thresholds

root_cause: Vector index corruption after failed ingestion batch from PDF pipeline
preventive_action: Added ingestion checksum validation and rollback mechanism

root_cause: Incremental model broke due to schema change in incidents table
preventive_action: Enforced dbt schema contracts for upstream tables

root_cause: RBAC mapping inconsistency between JWT claims and policy YAML definitions
preventive_action: Standardized RBAC schema across Auth and Governance services

root_cause: YAML policy parser failed due to malformed nested access_control rules
preventive_action: Added schema validation for governance YAML ingestion

root_cause: Nested JSON ticket comments exploded incorrectly during ETL flattening
preventive_action: Fixed recursive flattening logic in ingestion pipeline

root_cause: Increased query complexity due to unoptimized dbt Gold layer joins
preventive_action: Optimized Gold layer models with pre-aggregations

root_cause: PDF parser failed on structured HR policy documents with multi-column layout
preventive_action: Migrated to robust layout-aware PDF extraction engine

root_cause: Airflow DAG delay caused stale incident metrics in dashboards
preventive_action: Added retry policies and DAG SLA alerts

root_cause: HuggingFace embedding model version mismatch after dependency update
preventive_action: Pinned embedding model version and added version checks

root_cause: Over-sensitive alert thresholds on non-critical latency fluctuations
preventive_action: Adjusted alert thresholds and introduced anomaly-based alerting

root_cause: Upstream ingestion delay caused dbt dependency chain failure across Gold models
preventive_action: Introduced dbt run-ops isolation for critical models

root_cause: JWT validation broke due to rotated signing key not propagated to all services
preventive_action: Centralized key rotation with propagation verification layer

root_cause: Embedding model drift after dependency upgrade in HuggingFace library
preventive_action: Locked embedding model version and added regression tests

root_cause: Nested JSON flattening logic caused duplicate comment expansion during retry job
preventive_action: Implemented idempotent ETL transformation layer

root_cause: Policy evaluation engine skipped RESTRICTED classification due to YAML parsing bug
preventive_action: Added strict schema validation for policy ingestion

root_cause: dbt incremental model failed to update due to incorrect watermark logic
preventive_action: Standardized incremental model pattern with watermark validation

root_cause: Multi-column PDF layout broke paragraph extraction in HR policy ingestion
preventive_action: Migrated to layout-aware PDF parsing engine with fallback OCR

root_cause: Inefficient vector similarity joins in DuckDB under high query load
preventive_action: Added precomputed embeddings cache layer

root_cause: JSON schema mismatch between tickets and parser expectations caused pipeline crash
preventive_action: Added schema validation and contract enforcement at ingestion boundary

root_cause: Over-sensitive anomaly detection model flagged normal traffic fluctuations
preventive_action: Recalibrated anomaly detection thresholds using historical baselines

root_cause: Malformed ticket JSON propagated into warehouse causing downstream dbt model failure cascade
preventive_action: Enforced strict schema validation at ingestion boundary with reject pipeline

root_cause: Missing upstream dependency declaration in dbt model caused silent stale data propagation
preventive_action: Enforced dbt dependency graph validation in CI pipeline

root_cause: Token introspection service overloaded due to unbounded retry storms
preventive_action: Added exponential backoff and circuit breaker pattern

root_cause: Embedding model drift combined with outdated vector index re-indexing failure
preventive_action: Automated nightly re-indexing pipeline introduced

root_cause: Policy evaluation skipped RESTRICTED classification due to caching bug in YAML parser
preventive_action: Disabled unsafe policy caching and enforced real-time evaluation

root_cause: Recursive flattening logic dropped deeply nested comment threads during ETL transformation
preventive_action: Implemented depth-aware recursive parsing with audit checks

root_cause: OCR fallback incorrectly triggered for structured PDFs causing noisy text ingestion
preventive_action: Improved PDF layout classification before OCR fallback

root_cause: Unoptimized joins between Gold layer dbt models caused exponential query execution time
preventive_action: Introduced materialized views for high-traffic analytics queries

root_cause: Schema mismatch between YAML governance policies and ingestion validation engine caused full pipeline halt
preventive_action: Aligned schema contracts across governance and ingestion systems

root_cause: Threshold-based alerting misclassified normal variance in latency as anomalies
preventive_action: Migrated alerting system to anomaly-detection-based thresholds
